The MBSF Chronic Conditions segments include a record for each eligible beneficiary during the year and does not 
limit inclusion to those with a chronic condition. Although CMS began disseminating Medicare managed care 
encounter data for people enrolled in Medicare Advantage (MA) plans starting in 2015, the chronic condition 
algorithms currently do not consider encounter data. Therefore, users should view the CCW as a
